mapper.insert: insert into `health_item` (name, detail, icon_url, unit, symbol, normal_value, user_id, is_global, create_time) value (#{name}, #{detail}, #{iconUrl}, #{unit}, #{symbol}, #{normalValue}, #{userId}, #{isGlobal}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: select sum(case when is_global = #{isGlobal} then 1 else 0 end) as globalItemCount, sum(case when user_id = #{userId} then 1 else 0 end) as privateItemCount from `health_item`

SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM `health_item` WHERE `name` = #{name} AND ( -- 规则1：管理员创建的公有健康项（is_global=1） `is_global` = 1 OR -- 规则2：当前用户自己创建的私有健康项（is_global=0 且 user_id=当前用户ID） (`is_global` = 0 AND `user_id` = #{userId}) )

SELECT id FROM `health_item` WHERE `name` = #{name} AND ( -- 规则1：管理员创建的公有健康项（is_global=1） `is_global` = 1 OR -- 规则2：当前用户自己创建的私有健康项（is_global=0 且 user_id=当前用户ID） (`is_global` = 0 AND `user_id` = #{userId}) ) LIMIT 1
